scope: Canonical chroma controls, swatch, hex validation, slider drafts, reset and eyedropper synchronization.

assertions: tolerance, smoothness and spill stay within canonical 0..100 bounds
host rejection rolls chroma state back without a second store
sliders commit once at gesture end and malformed hex remains local with feedback

configured.summary: Chroma key on: #ff00aa, tolerance 35%, smoothness 20%, spill 15%.

rejected: Legacy-only chroma state: controls commit through SliceGridController and persisted sliceGrid recipe state.
Invalid hex leaking to the worker: text input stays draft-only until a strict six-digit color is supplied.
Slider history spam: local drafts commit on pointer/key boundary and no-op controller commits return true without publishing.
Eyedropper drift: canonical recipe and shared legacy swatch are both updated by the same successful sample.
Source-less affordances: fieldset and reset are semantically disabled; production AX tree reports no unlabeled interactive.
adversarialAutopsy.boundary: This slice exposes the recipe controls and synchronization surface. Worker chroma math is frozen by G4-01; processing order and hostile transparent/no-match gates remain G4-04/G4-05.

verification.build: pass (known JSZip dynamic-import and >500kB chunk warnings remain baseline)
